description_long: This is a structured, modern flat-brim cap, commonly known as a fitted baseball cap, with a high, rounded crown and a wide, flat brim. The cap is predominantly a solid light gray color, with a subtle texture visible on the fabric. A gold and black sticker is affixed to the top of the brim, displaying sizing and branding details, which is a signature feature of New Era 59FIFTY caps. The crown is constructed from six panels, each joined by visible stitching and topped with a small button at the apex. On the side, an embossed New Era flag logo is subtly integrated into the fabric, adding a touch of brand identity without contrasting color. The overall appearance is clean, minimalistic, and urban, making it a popular accessory in streetwear fashion.
description: A light gray, flat-brim fitted cap with a high, rounded crown, gold sticker on the brim, and subtle New Era branding. The design is clean, minimal, and urban.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat, wide brim with a prominent gold and black sticker and the high, rounded crown.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the embossed New Era flag logo and the smooth, uninterrupted curve of the crown and brim.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the seamless, panel-stitched crown with a central button and no visible branding or openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the flat brim and crown, with the sticker partially visible and no additional branding.
